x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libtab_dll.a CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/mingw/tab_dll_api.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/tlv.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/queue.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/log.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/compat/posix_win.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/compat/progname.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/compat/reallocarray.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/compat/setproctitle.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/compat/strlcat.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/compat/strlcpy.c.obj CMakeFiles/tab_dll.dir/src/compat/strtonum.c.obj
/opt/local/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib libtab_dll.a
